location: A 2% drop from cleaver-wielding Misbegotten enemies. The most reliable early spot is Castle Morne in the Weeping Peninsula — from the Behind the Castle grace, head west and drop down the rocks to a ledge with several sleeping Misbegotten below the castle wall.
tactics: From the Behind the Castle grace, run west and drop off the castle wall onto the rocks below — several Misbegotten sleep here and can be backstabbed one at a time without waking the others
2% is a low drop rate, so expect to reset the area (rest and return) many times; the sleeping enemies make this a safe, low-risk repeat farm
Cleaver-wielding Misbegotten also show up later in Leyndell, Royal Capital and a few other locations, so the weapon can be picked up incidentally elsewhere if the Castle Morne farm is slow
lore: A crude iron cleaver favored by the Misbegotten, swung with wild, relentless abandon by creatures who pour their outcast resentment into every strike.

builds.name: Pure Strength bruiser
builds.why: C-grade Strength scaling — among the best in the base axe roster — paired with a low Dexterity requirement makes it a dedicated Strength two-hander.

builds.name: Early Strength quality option
builds.why: Available very early in Weeping Peninsula, giving Strength builds a heavier axe option before even reaching Stormveil Castle.
